And Notice Of Motion To Quash Subpoena; For Protective Order And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff Maura Griffin's motion for a protective order is granted in part.
The subpoenas for records are modified as follows:
Medical records:
The subpoena is modified to only require production of records that relate to conditions of the back and legs. Any other information may be redacted.

Employment records
The subpoena is modified to only require production of records that describe: job title, duties, dates of employment, and compensation. Any other information may be redacted.

Academic records
The subpoena is modified to only require production of records that describe: dates of enrollment, tuition, and attendance records. Any other information may be redacted.
The request for monetary sanctions is denied. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
